closed_world.value: Namiya General Store - a advice-giving establishment that receives letters through a mail slot
closed_world.quote: whoever sent me the blank letter... This letter was for him. An answer. Written by none other than the real Mr. Namiya.

resolution.value: Mr. Namiya interprets a blank letter as symbolic of absence of a life map and provides philosophical counsel about self-determination
resolution.quote: A blank map means you can fill it in however you like. It's entirely up to you. Everything is open; the possibilities are limitless.

investigator.value: Atsuya - the person who sent the blank letter, receiving a response from Mr. Namiya
investigator.quote: Atsuya gulped. He had been the one who slipped the blank sheet of paper through the mail slot.
